text: Kāf, Hā, Yā, ʿAyn, Ṣād.
tl: Kaaaf-Haa-Yaa-'Ayyyn-Saaad

text: [This is] a mention of the mercy of your Lord to His servant Zechariah
tl: Zikru rahmati Rabbika 'abdahoo Zakariyya

text: When he called to his Lord a private call [i.e., supplication].
tl: Iz naadaa Rabbahoo nidaaa'an khafiyyaa

text: He said, \"My Lord, indeed my bones have weakened, and my head has filled with white, and never have I been in my supplication to You, my Lord, unhappy [i.e., disappointed].
tl: Qaala Rabbi innee wahanal 'azmu minnee washta-'alar ra'su shaibanw Wa-lam akun bidu'aaa'ika Rabbi shaqiyyaa

text: And indeed, I fear the successors after me, and my wife has been barren, so give me from Yourself an heir
tl: Wa-innee khiftul mawaaliya minw waraaa'ee Wa-kaanat imra atee 'aqiran fa-hablee mil ladunka waliyyaa

text: Who will inherit me and inherit from the family of Jacob. And make him, my Lord, pleasing [to You].\"
tl: Yarisunee Wa-yarisu min aali Ya'qoob, waj'alhu Rabbi radiyya

text: [He was told], \"O Zechariah, indeed We give you good tidings of a boy whose name will be John. We have not assigned to any before [this] name.\"
tl: Yaa-Zakariyyaaa innaa nubashshiruka bi-ghulaamin ismuhoo Yahyaa lam naj'al lahoo min qablu samiyyaa

text: He said, \"My Lord, how will I have a boy when my wife has been barren and I have reached extreme old age?\"
tl: Qaala Rabbi annaa yakoonu lee ghulaamunw Wa-kaanat imra-atee 'aaqiranw Wa-qad balaghtu minal kibari 'itiyyaa

text: [An angel] said, \"Thus [it will be]; your Lord says, 'It is easy for Me, for I created you before, while you were nothing.'\"
tl: Qaala kazaalika qaala Rabbuka huwa 'alaiya haiyinunw Wa-qad khalaqtuka min qablu Wa-lam taku shai'aa

text: [Zechariah] said, \"My Lord, make for me a sign.\" He said, \"Your sign is that you will not speak to the people for three nights, [being] sound.\"
tl: Qaala Rabbij 'al leee Aayah; qaala Aayatuka allaa tukalliman naasa salaasa layaalin sawiyyaa

text: So he came out to his people from the prayer chamber and signaled to them to exalt [Allāh] in the morning and afternoon.
tl: Fakharaja 'alaa qawmihee minal mihraabi fa-awhaaa ilaihim an sabbihoo bukratanw Wa-'ashiyyaa

text: [Allāh said], \"O John, take the Scripture [i.e., adhere to it] with determination.\" And We gave him judgement [while yet] a boy
tl: Yaa-Yahyaa khuzil Kitaaba biquwwatinw Wa-aatainaahul hukma sabiyyaa

text: And affection from Us and purity, and he was fearing of Allāh
tl: Wa-hanaanam mil ladunnaa Wa-zakaatanw Wa-kaana taqiyyaa

text: And dutiful to his parents, and he was not a disobedient tyrant.
tl: Wa-barram biwaalidayhi Wa-lam yakum jabbaaran 'asiyyaa

text: And peace be upon him the day he was born and the day he dies and the day he is raised alive.
tl: Wa-salaamun 'alaihi yawma wulida Wa-yawma yamootu Wa-yawma yub'asu haiyyaa

text: And mention, [O Muḥammad], in the Book [the story of] Mary, when she withdrew from her family to a place toward the east.
tl: Wazkur fil Kitaabi Maryma; izin tabazat min ahlihaa makaanan sharqiyyaa

text: And she took, in seclusion from them, a screen. Then We sent to her Our Angel [i.e., Gabriel], and he represented himself to her as a well-proportioned man.
tl: Fattakhazat min doonihim hijaaban fa-arsalnaaa ilaihaa roohanaa fatamassala lahaa basharan sawiyyaa

text: She said, \"Indeed, I seek refuge in the Most Merciful from you, [so leave me], if you should be fearing of Allāh.\"
tl: Qaalat inneee a'oozu bir-Rahmaani minka in kunta taqiyyaa

text: He said, \"I am only the messenger of your Lord to give you [news of] a pure boy [i.e., son].\"
tl: Qaala innamaa ana rasoolu Rabbiki li-ahaba laki ghulaaman zakiyyaa

text: She said, \"How can I have a boy while no man has touched me and I have not been unchaste?\"
tl: Qaalat anna yakoonu lee ghulaamunw Wa-lam yamsasnee bashrunw Wa-lam aku baghiyyaa

text: He said, \"Thus [it will be]; your Lord says, 'It is easy for Me, and We will make him a sign to the people and a mercy from Us. And it is a matter [already] decreed.'\"
tl: Qaala kazaaliki qaala Rabbuki huwa 'alaiya haiyyimunw Wa-linaj-'alahooo Aayatal linnaasi Wa-rahmatam minnaa; Wa-kaana amram maqdiyyaa

text: So she conceived him, and she withdrew with him to a remote place.
tl: Fahamalat-hu fantabazat bihee makaanan qasiyyaa

text: And the pains of childbirth drove her to the trunk of a palm tree. She said, \"Oh, I wish I had died before this and was in oblivion, forgotten.\"
tl: Fa-ajaaa-'ahal makhaadu ilaa jiz'in nakhlati qaalat yaa-laitanee mittu qabla haazaa Wa-kuntu nasyam mansiyyaa

text: But he called her from below her, \"Do not grieve; your Lord has provided beneath you a stream.
tl: Fanaadaahaa min tahtihaaa allaa tahzanee qad ja'ala Rabbuki tahtaki sariyyaa

text: And shake toward you the trunk of the palm tree; it will drop upon you ripe, fresh dates.
tl: Wa-huzzeee ilaiki bijiz-'in nakhlati tusaaqit 'alaiki rutaban janiyyaa

text: So eat and drink and be contented. And if you see from among humanity anyone, say, 'Indeed, I have vowed to the Most Merciful abstention, so I will not speak today to [any] man.'\"
tl: Fakulee washrabee Wa-qarree 'ainaa; fa-immaa tarayinnna minal bashari ahadan faqooleee innee nazartu lir-Rahmaani sawman falan ukallimal yawma insiyyaa

text: Then she brought him to her people, carrying him. They said, \"O Mary, you have certainly done a thing unprecedented.
tl: Fa-atat bihee qawmahaa tahmiluhoo qaaloo yaa-Maryamoo laqad ji'ti shai'an fariyyaa

text: O sister [i.e., descendant] of Aaron, your father was not a man of evil, nor was your mother unchaste.\"
tl: Yaaa-ukhta Haaroona maa kaana abooki mra'a saw'inw Wa-maa kaanat ummuki baghiyyaa

text: So she pointed to him. They said, \"How can we speak to one who is in the cradle a child?\"
tl: Fa-ashaarat ilaih; qaaloo kaifa nukallimu man kaana fil mahdi sabiyyaa

text: [Jesus] said, \"Indeed, I am the servant of Allāh. He has given me the Scripture and made me a prophet.
tl: Qaala innee 'abdul laahi aataaniyal Kitaaba Wa-ja'alanee Nabiyyaa

text: And He has made me blessed wherever I am and has enjoined upon me prayer and zakāh as long as I remain alive
tl: Wa-ja'alanee mubaarakan aina maa kuntu Wa-awsaanee bis-Salaati waz-Zakaati maa dumtu haiyaa

text: And [made me] dutiful to my mother, and He has not made me a wretched tyrant.
tl: Wa-barram biwaalidatee Wa-lam yaj'alnee jabbaaran shaqiyyaa

text: And peace is on me the day I was born and the day I will die and the day I am raised alive.\"
tl: Wassalaamu 'alaiya yawma wulidtu Wa-yawma amootu Wa-yawma ub'asu haiyaa

text: That is Jesus, the son of Mary - the word of truth about which they are in dispute.
tl: Zaalika 'Eesab nu Maryama; qawlal haqqil lazee feehi yamtaroon

text: It is not [befitting] for Allāh to take a son; exalted is He! When He decrees an affair, He only says to it, \"Be,\" and it is.
tl: Maa kaana lillaahi aien yattakhiza minw waladin Subhaanah; izaa qadaaa amran fa-innamaa yaqoolu lahoo kun fa-yakoon

text: [Jesus said], \"And indeed, Allāh is my Lord and your Lord, so worship Him. That is a straight path.\"
tl: Wa-innal laaha Rabbee Wa-Rabbukum fa'budooh; haazaa Siraatum Mustaqeem

text: Then the factions differed [concerning Jesus] from among them, so woe to those who disbelieved - from the scene of a tremendous Day.
tl: Fakhtalafal ahzaabu min bainihim fawailul lillazeena kafaroo min mashhadi Yawmin 'azeem

text: How [clearly] they will hear and see the Day they come to Us, but the wrongdoers today are in clear error.
tl: Asmi' bihim Wa-absir Yawma ya'toonanaa laakiniz zaalimoonal yawma fee dalaalin mubeen

text: And warn them, [O Muḥammad], of the Day of Regret, when the matter will be concluded; and [yet], they are in [a state of] heedlessness, and they do not believe.
tl: Wa-anzirhum Yawmal hasrati iz qudiyal amr; Wa-hum fee ghaflatinw Wa-hum laa yu'minoon

text: Indeed, it is We who will inherit the earth and whoever is on it, and to Us they will be returned.
tl: Innaa nahnu narisul arda Wa-man 'alaihaa Wa-ilainaa yurja'oon

text: And mention in the Book [the story of] Abraham. Indeed, he was a man of truth and a prophet.
tl: Wazkur fil Kitaabi Ibraaheem; innahoo kaana siddeeqan Nabiyyaa

text: [Mention] when he said to his father, \"O my father, why do you worship that which does not hear and does not see and will not benefit you at all?
tl: Iz qaala li-abeehi yaaa-abati lima ta'budu maa laa yasma'u Wa-laa yubsiru Wa-laa yughnee 'anka shai'aa

text: O my father, indeed there has come to me of knowledge that which has not come to you, so follow me; I will guide you to an even path.
tl: Yaaa-abati innee qad jaaa'anee minal 'ilmi maa lam ya'tika fattabi'neee ahdika siraatan Sawiyyaa

text: O my father, do not worship [i.e., obey] Satan. Indeed Satan has ever been, to the Most Merciful, disobedient.
tl: Yaaa-abati laa ta'budish Shaitaan; innash Shaitaana kaana lir-Rahmaani 'asiyyaa

text: O my father, indeed I fear that there will touch you a punishment from the Most Merciful so you would be to Satan a companion [in Hellfire].\"
tl: Yaaa-abati innee akhaafu aien yamassaka 'azaabum minar Rahmaani fatakoona lish-Shaitaani waliyyaa

text: [His father] said, \"Have you no desire for my gods, O Abraham? If you do not desist, I will surely stone you, so avoid me a prolonged time.\"
tl: Qaala araaghibun anta 'an aalihatee yaaa-Ibraaheemu la-'il lam tantahi la-arjumannaka wahjurnee maliyyaa

text: [Abraham] said, \"Peace [i.e., safety] will be upon you. I will ask forgiveness for you of my Lord. Indeed, He is ever gracious to me.
tl: Qaala salaamun 'alaika sa-astaghfiru laka Rabbeee innahoo kaana bee hafiyyaa

text: And I will leave you and those you invoke other than Allāh and will invoke my Lord. I expect that I will not be in invocation to my Lord unhappy [i.e., disappointed].\"
tl: Wa-a'tazilukum Wa-maa tad'oona min doonil laahi Wa-ad'oo Rabbee 'asaaa allaaa akoona bidu'aaa'i Rabbee shaqiyyaa

text: So when he had left them and those they worshipped other than Allāh, We gave him Isaac and Jacob, and each [of them] We made a prophet.
tl: Fa-lam ma'tazalahum Wa-maa ya'budoona min doonil laahi wahabnaa lahoo is-haaqa Wa-ya'qoob; Wa-kullan ja'alnaa Nabiyyaa

text: And We gave them of Our mercy, and We made for them a mention [i.e., reputation] of high honor.
tl: Wa wahabnaa lahum mirrahmatinaa Wa-ja'alnaa lahum lisaana sidqin 'aliyyaa

text: And mention in the Book, Moses. Indeed, he was chosen, and he was a messenger and a prophet.
tl: Wazkur fil Kitaabi Moosaaa; innahoo kaana mukhlasanw Wa-kaana Rasoolan Nabiyyaa

text: And We called him from the side of the mount at [his] right and brought him near, confiding [to him].
tl: Wa-naadainaahu min jaanibit Tooril aimani Wa-qarrabnaahu najiyyaa

text: And We gave him out of Our mercy his brother Aaron as a prophet.
tl: Wa-wahabnaa lahoo mir rahmatinaaa akhaahu Haaroona Nabiyyaa

text: And mention in the Book, Ishmael. Indeed, he was true to his promise, and he was a messenger and a prophet.
tl: Wazkur fil Kitaabi ismaa'eel; innahoo kaana saadiqal wa'di Wa-kaana Rasoolan Nabiyyaa

text: And he used to enjoin on his people prayer and zakāh and was to his Lord pleasing [i.e., accepted by Him].
tl: Wa-kaana ya'muru ahlahoo bis-Salaati waz-zakaati Wa-kaana 'inda Rabbihee mardiyyaa

text: And mention in the Book, Idrees. Indeed, he was a man of truth and a prophet.
tl: Wazkur fil Kitaabi Idrees; innahoo kaana siddeeqan Nabiyyaa

text: And We raised him to a high station.
tl: Wa-rafa'naahu makaanan 'aliyyaa

text: Those were the ones upon whom Allāh bestowed favor from among the prophets of the descendants of Adam and of those We carried [in the ship] with Noah, and of the descendants of Abraham and Israel [i.e., Jacob], and of those whom We guided and chose. When the verses of the Most Merciful were recited to them, they fell in prostration and weeping.
tl: Ulaaa'ikal lazeena an'amal laahu 'alaihim minan Nabiyyeena min zurriyyati Aadama Wa-mimman hamalnaa ma'a Noohinw Wa-min zurriyyati Ibraaheema Wa-Israaa'eela Wa-mimman hadainaa wajta-bainaaa; izaa tutlaa 'alaihim Aayaatur Rahmaani kharroo sujjadanw Wa-bukiyyaa

text: But there came after them successors [i.e., later generations] who neglected prayer and pursued desires; so they are going to meet evil -
tl: Fakhalafa min ba'dihim khalfun adaa'us Salaata wattaba'ush shahawaati fasawfa yalqawna ghaiyyaa

text: Except those who repent, believe and do righteousness; for those will enter Paradise and will not be wronged at all.
tl: Illaa man taaba Wa-aamana Wa-'amila saalihan fa-ulaaa'ika yadkhuloonal jannata Wa-laa yuzlamoona shai'aa

text: [Therein are] gardens of perpetual residence which the Most Merciful has promised His servants in the unseen. Indeed, His promise has ever been eminent.
tl: Jannaati 'adninil latee wa'adar Rahmaanu ibaadahoo bilghaib; innahoo kaana wa'duhoo ma'tiyyaa

text: They will not hear therein any ill speech - only [greetings of] peace - and they will have their provision therein, morning and afternoon.
tl: Laa yasma'oona feehaa laghwan illaa salaamaa; Wa-lahum rizquhum feehaa bukratanw Wa-'ashiyyaa

text: That is Paradise, which We give as inheritance to those of Our servants who were fearing of Allāh.
tl: Tilkal jannatul latee noorisu min 'ibaadinaa man kaana taqiyyaa

text: [Gabriel said], \"And we [angels] descend not except by the order of your Lord. To Him belongs that before us and that behind us and what is in between. And never is your Lord forgetful -
tl: Wa-maa natanazzalu illaa bi-amri Rabbika lahoo maa baina aideenaa Wa-maa khalfanaa Wa-maa baina zaalik; Wa-maa kaana Rabbuka nasiyyaa

text: Lord of the heavens and the earth and whatever is between them - so worship Him and have patience for His worship. Do you know of any similarity to Him?\"
tl: Rabbus samaawaati wal-ardi Wa-maa bainahumaa fa'bud-hu wastabir li'ibaadatih; hal ta'lamu lahoo samiyyaa

text: And man [i.e., the disbeliever] says, \"When I have died, am I going to be brought forth alive?\"
tl: Wa-yaqoolul insaanu 'a-izaa maa mittu lasawfa ukhraju haiyaa

text: Does man not remember that We created him before, while he was nothing?
tl: A-Wa-laa yazkurul insaanu annaa khalaqnaahu min qablu Wa-lam yaku shai'aa

text: So by your Lord, We will surely gather them and the devils; then We will bring them to be present around Hell upon their knees.
tl: Fawa-Rabbika lanahshu-rannahum wash-shayaateena summa lanuhdirannahum hawla jahannama jisiyyaa

text: Then We will surely extract from every sect those of them who were worst against the Most Merciful in insolence.
tl: Summa lanan-zi'anna min kulli shee'atin aiyuhum ashaddu 'alar Rahmaani 'itiyyaa

text: Then, surely it is We who are most knowing of those most worthy of burning therein.
tl: Summa lanahnu a'lamu billazeena hum awlaa bihaa siliyyaa

text: And there is none of you except he will come to it. This is upon your Lord an inevitability decreed.
tl: Wa-in minkum illaa waariduhaa; kaana 'alaa Rabbika hatmam maqdiyyaa

text: Then We will save those who feared Allāh and leave the wrongdoers within it, on their knees.
tl: Summa nunajjil lazeenat taqaw Wa-nazaruz zaalimeena feehaa jisiyyaa

text: And when Our verses are recited to them as clear evidences, those who disbelieve say to those who believe, \"Which of [our] two parties is best in position and best in association?\"
tl: Wa-izaa tutlaa 'alaihim Aayaatunaa baiyinaatin qaalal lazeena kafaroo lillazeena aamanooo aiyul fareeqaini khairum maqaamanw Wa-ahsanu nadiyyaa

text: And how many a generation have We destroyed before them who were better in possessions and [outward] appearance?
tl: Wa-kam ahlaknaa qablahum min qarnin hum ahsanu asaasanw Wa-ri'yaa

text: Say, \"Whoever is in error - let the Most Merciful extend for him an extension [in wealth and time] until, when they see that which they were promised - either punishment [in this world] or the Hour [of resurrection] - they will come to know who is worst in position and weaker in soldiers.\"
tl: Qul man kaana fid da-laalati falyamdud lahur Rahmaanu maddaa; hattaaa izaa ra-aw maa yoo'adoona immal 'azaaba Wa-immas Saa'ata fasa-ya'lamoona man huwa sharrum makaananw Wa-ad'afu jundaa

text: And Allāh increases those who were guided, in guidance, and the enduring good deeds are better to your Lord for reward and better for recourse.
tl: Wa-yazeedul laahul lazeenah tadaw hudaa; wal-baaqiyaatus saalihaatu khairun 'inda Rabbika sawaabanw Wa-khairum maraddaa

text: Then, have you seen he who disbelieved in Our verses and said, \"I will surely be given wealth and children [in the next life]\"?
tl: Afara'aytal lazee kafara bi-Aayaatinaa Wa-qaala la-oota-yanna maalanw Wa-waladaa

text: Has he looked into the unseen, or has he taken from the Most Merciful a promise?
tl: At-tala'al ghaiba 'amit takhaza 'indar Rahmaani 'ahdaa

text: No! We will record what he says and extend [i.e., increase] for him from the punishment extensively.
tl: Kallaa; sanaktubu maa yaqoolu Wa-namuddu lahoo minal 'azaabi maddaa

text: And We will inherit him [in] what he mentions, and he will come to Us alone.
tl: Wa-narisuhoo maa yaqoolu Wa-ya'teenaa fardaa

text: And they have taken besides Allāh [false] deities that they would be for them [a source of] honor.
tl: Wattakhazoo min doonil laahi aalihatal liyakoonoo lahum 'izzaa

text: No! They [i.e., those \"gods\"] will deny their worship of them and will be against them opponents [on the Day of Judgement].
tl: Kallaa; sa-yakfuroona bi'ibaadatihim Wa-yakoonoona 'alaihim diddaa

text: Do you not see that We have sent the devils upon the disbelievers, inciting them [to evil] with [constant] incitement?
tl: Alam tara annaaa arsalnash Shayaateena 'alal kaafireena ta'uzzuhum azzaa

text: So be not impatient over them. We only count out [i.e., allow] to them a [limited] number.
tl: Falaa ta'jal alaihim innamaa na-'uddu lahum 'addaa

text: On the Day We will gather the righteous to the Most Merciful as a delegation
tl: Yawma nahshurul muttaqeena ilar Rahmaani wafdaa

text: And will drive the criminals to Hell in thirst
tl: Wa-nasooqul mujrimeena ilaa Jahannama wirdaa

text: None will have [power of] intercession except he who had taken from the Most Merciful a covenant.
tl: Laa yamlikoonash shafaa'ata illaa manit takhaza 'indar Rahmaani 'ahdaa

text: And they say, \"The Most Merciful has taken [for Himself] a son.\"
tl: Wa-qaalut takhazar Rahmaanu waladaa

text: You have done an atrocious thing.
tl: Laqad ji'tum shai'an iddaa

text: The heavens almost rupture therefrom and the earth splits open and the mountains collapse in devastation
tl: Takaadus samaawaatu yatafattarna minhu Wa-tanshaq qul-ardu Wa-takhirrul jibaalu haddaa

text: That they attribute to the Most Merciful a son.
tl: An da'aw lir-Rahmaani waladaa

text: And it is not appropriate for the Most Merciful that He should take a son.
tl: Wa-maa yambaghee li-Rahmaani aien yattakhiza waladaa

text: There is no one in the heavens and earth but that he comes to the Most Merciful as a servant.
tl: In kullu man fis samaawaati wal-ardi illaaa aatir Rahmaani 'abdaa

text: He has enumerated them and counted them a [full] counting.
tl: Laqad ahsaahum Wa-addahum 'addaa

text: And all of them are coming to Him on the Day of Resurrection alone.
tl: Wa-kulluhum aateehi Yawmal Qiyaamati fardaa

text: Indeed, those who have believed and done righteous deeds - the Most Merciful will appoint for them affection.
tl: Innal lazeena aamanoo Wa-'amilus saalihaati sa-yaj'alu lahumur Rahmaanu wuddaa

text: So, [O Muḥammad], We have only made it [i.e., the Qur’ān] easy in your tongue [i.e., the Arabic language] that you may give good tidings thereby to the righteous and warn thereby a hostile people.
tl: Fa-innamaa yassarnaahu bilisaanika litubashshira bihil muttaqeena Wa-tunzira bihee qawmal luddaa

text: And how many have We destroyed before them of generations? Do you perceive of them anyone or hear from them a sound?
tl: Wa-kam ahlaknaa qabla-hum min qarnin hal tuhissu minhum min ahadin aw tasma'u lahum rikzaa
